cases.prompt: Resume work from the latest handoff file in .planning/handoffs/.
cases.expected_behavior: Finds the handoff, summarizes it, and continues from there.

cases.prompt: Pick up the previous session and continue from the documented next step.
cases.expected_behavior: Restores prior context and proceeds with the handoff flow.

cases.prompt: Start a brand new feature with no previous context.
cases.expected_behavior: This is a fresh start, not a pickup flow.

cases.prompt: I only know there is a handoff file somewhere; find it and continue the work.
cases.expected_behavior: Discovers available handoffs and resumes from the selected one.
